is_gsc_zero_real: PROBABLY NOT — GSC reporting lag. The 7-day API pull shows 77 impressions. The 24-hour window likely hasn't populated yet (2-3 day GSC delay is normal). The site IS getting impressions (~11/day), just at very low volume from obscure queries.
gsc_ui_indexing_happened: PARTIALLY. Batch 7 (10 URLs) proven via run log. Batches 1-6 lack submission evidence. Batch 9 attempted via subagent but TIMED OUT. CloakBrowser GSC UI MUST use direct terminal execution.
googlebot_evidence: GSC API confirms 25 queries, 20 pages found in SERPs. Crawl is happening but at low volume (~11 impressions/day).
technical_blockers: NONE. Site is fully healthy. HTTP 200, robots.txt clean, canonical correct, no accidental noindex.
recovery_actions_executed: ✅ Fresh GSC data pulled (77 imp, 25 queries, 20 pages)
✅ GSC UI indexing discrepancy identified (only 10/70 proven)
⏳ GSC UI Batch 9 — subagent timeout, needs direct execution
⏳ 2 follow-ups due today — not sent (requires Auditor approval)

biggest_root_cause: DOMAIN AUTHORITY (SANDBOX). QFINHUB is 33 days old with 0 backlinks. Google is crawling but not trusting the domain enough to rank. Internal optimization (indexing, links, content) helps but cannot substitute for external trust signals. The GSC UI indexing discrepancy (only 10/70 URLs proven) means fewer pages are actively being prompted for re-crawl, but even if all 105 T3 calcs were GSC UI submitted, they'd still struggle to rank without backlinks.

Send 2 follow-up outreach emails (Money Under 30, Max Real Estate Exposure)
